title: Ian Osgood
text: Home * People * Ian Osgood Ian Osgood [1] Ian Osgood , an American software developer [2] , chess player, chess coach and tournament director [3] . He is author of FCP [4] , the Forth Chess Program, originally derived from Tom Kerrigan's simple chess program TSCP , and the Forth Go playing program FGP [5] .
